subject: refactor(modal): extract useFocusTrap hook, migrate Modal onto it
body:
Pattern item the burger-menu audit flagged as deferred. Ship the shared
hook now so any future disclosure that needs Tab/Shift+Tab cycling (modals,
drawers, future picker panels) uses one implementation.

- src/hooks/useFocusTrap.ts: exact pattern-doc implementation — document
  keydown listener active only while `active`, snapshots prior focus on
  activation, restores on cleanup. Wraps first↔last on Tab / Shift+Tab
  boundary.
- Modal.tsx: delete the inline 25-line trap logic (was copy-pasted from
  pre-DaisyUI times), call useFocusTrap(dialogRef, open). onKeyDown
  handler on <dialog> is removed since the document-level listener inside
  the hook supersedes it. Zero behavior change: focus cycling works the
  same; prior focus restoration is a small net a11y improvement (inline
  version didn't restore on close — useFocusTrap does).

Tags: refactor, a11y, hooks, focus-trap
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pattern-compliance
Semver: patch
title: extract useFocusTrap hook, migrate Modal onto it
